title: Homes England Management Information 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025
body: "             Homes England Management Information 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025    MS Excel Spreadsheet, 213 KB     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email enquiries@homesengland.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      Housing Completions and Housing Starts on Site will be published as Accredited Official Statistics on 26June 2025.  "
